name: dev.unity2rerun.sdk
description: Unity native SDK for Rerun - log Unity runtime data to .rrd files and Rerun Viewer without external bridge processes.

samples.description: Minimal Unity scene that saves a TextLog .rrd file via RerunManager.
Inspector-driven recording: Transform, Scalar, and TextLog publishers without writing code.
FileAndLive recording with live Rerun Viewer transport. Requires YetAnotherHttpHandler.
